creator: horance@freedom.ie.cycu.edu.tw
text:
MASTER_SITES changes

Fix: apply this patch to ${PORTSDIR}/devel/libffi



DISTNAME=       libffi-1.20
CATEGORIES=	devel
-MASTER_SITES=   ftp://ftp.cygnus.com/pub/green/
+MASTER_SITES=   ftp://sourceware.cygnus.com/pub/libffi/

MAINTAINER=     horance@freedom.ie.cycu.edu.tw--2P1MGoQp7AIiv4iks8iPo320SeaweMcKn1zaRvPwPOWdB6zg
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig	Mon Nov 22 15:34:25 1999
+++ Makefile	Mon Nov 22 15:22:49 1999
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
